name: frontend-react
description: 'Frontend React development for Lego Loco Cluster dashboard. Covers React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, instance cards, ActiveContext state management, hotkeys, and responsive 3x3 grid layout.'

# Frontend React Skill

## When to Use
- React component creation or modification
- Dashboard layout and responsive design
- ActiveContext state management
- Tailwind CSS styling with Lego colors
- Vite build configuration

## Key Files
- `frontend/src/App.jsx` — main app
- `frontend/src/ActiveContext.jsx` — state provider
- `frontend/src/components/` — components
- `frontend/tailwind.config.js` — theme config

## Procedure
1. Understand component hierarchy and state flow
2. Check `docs/knowledge/frontend/` for prior findings
3. Follow React 19 functional patterns
4. Apply Lego color palette via Tailwind
5. Document in `docs/knowledge/frontend/<date>-<topic>.md`

## Tasks: F1 (discovery status), F2 (quality dashboard), F3 (loading optimization)
